text: EC2 Bootstrapping @ mstexncanatia @) s * Bootstrapping allows EC2 Build Automation e User Data - Accessed via the meta-data IP * http://169.254.169.254/latest/user-data * Anything in User Data is executed by the instance OS e ONLY on Launch * EC2 doesn't interpret, the OS needs to understand the User Data
